context: Tests whether the agent knows that cdk-nag must run continuously in CI (on every branch, not just at deploy time), and wires it correctly with npx cdk synth in the build pipeline.

checklist.name: Late-stage-only enforcement explained as wrong
checklist.description: The response explains that running cdk-nag only at deploy time means security defects are found too late, causing expensive rework

checklist.name: npx cdk synth added to ci.yml
checklist.description: The updated ci.yml includes npx cdk synth as a step that runs on every push and pull request

checklist.name: Synth step runs after npm ci and npm test
checklist.description: The cdk synth step appears after dependencies are installed and after tests run

checklist.name: CI triggers on pull_request (not just main push)
checklist.description: The workflow runs on pull_request events, not only on push to main

checklist.name: npm test && npx cdk synth pattern or equivalent
checklist.description: The workflow combines test and synth so both must pass (sequential or separate steps that both block merge)
